package main import ( "html" "strings" ) // BuildFeedbackEmail constructs a complete MIME email message containing user feedback. // The returned string is formatted with CRLF line breaks per RFC 5322 and includes: // - Sanitized headers to prevent CRLF injection // - HTML body with escaped user content for security // - Preserved whitespace in feedback content using 
 tag
func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (string, error) {
	// Sanitize header values to prevent CRLF injection attacks
	fromAddr = strings.ReplaceAll(fromAddr, "\r", "")
	fromAddr = strings.ReplaceAll(fromAddr, "\n", "")
	toAddr = strings.ReplaceAll(toAddr, "\r", "")
	toAddr = strings.ReplaceAll(toAddr, "\n", "")
	safeUserName := strings.ReplaceAll(userName, "\r", "")
	safeUserName = strings.ReplaceAll(safeUserName, "\n", "")

	// Escape HTML special characters in user-provided content
	escapedUserName := html.EscapeString(userName)
	escapedSubject := html.EscapeString(subject)
	escapedFeedback := html.EscapeString(feedbackContent)

	var builder strings.Builder

	// Construct email headers (RFC 5322 compliant with CRLF line breaks)
	builder.WriteString("From: " + fromAddr + "\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("To: " + toAddr + "\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("Subject: Feedback from " + safeUserName + "\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("MIME-Version: 1.0\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("\r\n") // Header-body separator

	// Construct HTML body with preserved whitespace formatting
	builder.WriteString("\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
User Feedback
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
Username: " + escapedUserName + "
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
Feedback Subject: " + escapedSubject + "
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
Feedback Content:
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
" + escapedFeedback + "
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("
\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("\r\n")
	builder.WriteString("")

	return builder.String(), nil
}

The returned string is formatted for direct use // with net/smtp.SendMail. tags for proper HTML rendering while preserving line breaks formattedContent := strings.ReplaceAll(escapedFeedbackContent, "\n", "
") // Construct HTML body with clear structure and UTF-8 declaration htmlBody := fmt.Sprintf(`

New User Feedback Received

Username:
%s
Feedback Subject:
%s
Feedback Content:
%s

This feedback was submitted through the user feedback system. Please review promptly.

`, escapedUserName, escapedFeedbackSubject, formattedContent) // Construct RFC-compliant email headers headers := []string{ fmt.Sprintf("From: %s", fromAddr), fmt.Sprintf("To: %s", toAddr), fmt.Sprintf("Subject: %s", encodedSubject), "MIME-Version: 1.0", "Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8", "Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable", // Ensures safe transmission of special characters } // Combine headers and body with proper CRLF separators required by SMTP fullMessage := strings.Join(headers, "\r\n") + "\r\n\r\n" + htmlBody return fullMessage, nil }
